action.content: Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).
action.label: context

action.content:
Let's face it: getting a divorce is stressful enough, but paying for a lawyer who doesn't care about your bank account? That's a whole other level of misery. You're probably staring at a stack of bills, wondering how you're going to afford legal representation while trying to keep your head above water. Well, stop worrying and start smiling because I'm here to help! As an attorney dedicated to the underdog, I specialize in fighting for your rights without charging you a single penny upfront.

*My fees are so low, you might actually have enough left over to buy a decent dinner out.* I understand that every dollar counts when you're trying to make ends meet, so I offer a unique sliding scale based on your income, ensuring that financial hardship never stops you from getting the justice you deserve. Whether it's dividing assets, sorting out child custody, or just figuring out who gets the toaster, I've got your back.

*You don't need a six-figure budget to win your case; you just need a good lawyer who actually listens.* Let's turn this chaotic situation into something manageable, one free consultation at a time. Don't let poverty dictate your personal life's biggest decisions. Reach out today, and let's get you back on track without breaking the bank! *Your future self will thank you for taking this step.*
action.label: response
